staticPages.title: About Us
staticPages.content: We've been selling vinyl records since 2010. We are passionate about music and our customers. We are located in Warsaw, Poland.

products.name: Pink Floyd - The Dark Side of the Moon
products.description: The eighth studio album by the English rock band Pink Floyd, released on 1 March 1973 by Harvest Records.

products.name: King Crimson - In the Court of the Crimson King
products.description: The debut studio album by British rock band King Crimson, released on 10 October 1969.

products.name: Radiohead - OK Computer
products.description: The third studio album by English rock band Radiohead, released in 1997.

products.name: Nirvana - Nevermind
products.description: The second studio album by American rock band Nirvana, released in 1991.

products.name: The Beatles - Abbey Road
products.description: The eleventh studio album by the English rock band the Beatles, released in 1969.

products.name: Led Zeppelin - Led Zeppelin IV
products.description: The untitled fourth studio album by the English rock band Led Zeppelin, released in 1971.

products.name: Miles Davis - Kind of Blue
products.description: The best-selling jazz album of all time by Miles Davis.

products.name: John Coltrane - A Love Supreme
products.description: A studio album by American jazz saxophonist John Coltrane, released in 1965.

products.name: Herbie Hancock - Head Hunters
products.description: The twelfth studio album by American jazz pianist Herbie Hancock, released in 1973.

products.name: Weather Report - Heavy Weather
products.description: The eighth studio album by jazz fusion group Weather Report, released in 1977.

products.name: Daft Punk - Random Access Memories
products.description: Daft Punk's fourth and final studio album.

products.name: Aphex Twin - Selected Ambient Works 85-92
products.description: The debut studio album by Aphex Twin, released in 1992.

products.name: Kraftwerk - The Man-Machine
products.description: The seventh studio album by the German electronic music band Kraftwerk, released in 1978.

products.name: Nas - Illmatic
products.description: The debut studio album by American rapper Nas, released in 1994.

products.name: A Tribe Called Quest - The Low End Theory
products.description: The second studio album by hip hop group A Tribe Called Quest, released in 1991.

products.name: Dr. Dre - The Chronic
products.description: The debut studio album by American hip hop producer Dr. Dre, released in 1992.

products.name: Kendrick Lamar - To Pimp a Butterfly
products.description: The third studio album by American rapper Kendrick Lamar, released in 2015.

products.name: Madvillain - Madvillainy
products.description: A collaboration between producer Madlib and rapper MF DOOM.

products.name: Bach - Goldberg Variations (Glenn Gould)
products.description: Glenn Gould's debut recording of J.S. Bach's Goldberg Variations.

products.name: Beethoven - Symphony No. 9 (Karajan)
products.description: Herbert von Karajan's legendary conducting of Beethoven's Ninth.

products.name: Burial - Untrue
products.description: The second studio album by British electronic musician Burial, released in 2007.

products.name: Godspeed You! Black Emperor - F# A# ∞
products.description: The debut album of the Canadian post-rock group Godspeed You! Black Emperor.

products.name: Depeche Mode - Violator
products.description: The seventh studio album by English electronic music band Depeche Mode, released in 1990.

products.name: The Cure - Disintegration
products.description: The eighth studio album by English rock band the Cure, released in 1989.

products.name: Wu-Tang Clan - Enter the Wu-Tang (36 Chambers)
products.description: The debut studio album by American hip hop group Wu-Tang Clan.

products.name: N.W.A - Straight Outta Compton
products.description: The debut studio album by hip hop group N.W.A, released in 1988.

products.name: Chet Baker - Chet Baker Sings
products.description: The debut vocal album by jazz trumpeter Chet Baker.

products.name: Stan Getz / Joao Gilberto - Getz/Gilberto
products.description: An album by American saxophonist Stan Getz and Brazilian guitarist João Gilberto.

products.name: The Chemical Brothers - Dig Your Own Hole
products.description: The second studio album by English electronic music duo the Chemical Brothers.

products.name: Brian Eno - Music for Airports
products.description: The sixth studio album by English musician Brian Eno, released in 1978.
